title: Best Hotels in Trat Thailand (2026)
meta_description: The Trat hotels that actually help plan the stay: strong town bases, plus two selective Koh Chang resort options when an island overnight is intentional.
intro: Trat hotel choice is easiest when you separate mainland-town stays from island overnights. The better shortlist favors official property sites, practical city hotels for the old quarter and community routes, and only a couple of selective Koh Chang resort options when the sea extension is genuinely part of the trip.

items.name: Trat City Hotel
items.description: The strongest practical mainland base when you want a proper city stay and direct official contact instead of another resort-led detour.
highlights: Useful for a mainland Trat stay
insider_tips: Best when the museum, old quarter, and Ban Nam Chiao matter more than waking up on the island.
items.current_info: The official Trat City Hotel site still positions it as a practical city base in Trat.

items.name: Chivapuri Residence Trat
items.description: A good city hotel if you want walkable access to the bus-station side, night market area, and a straightforward local-food base.
insider_tips: A better fit for short mainland stays than for travelers whose entire plan is island-only.
items.current_info: Chivapuri Residence Trat's direct site still highlights bus-station proximity plus free Wi-Fi and parking.

items.name: Avada Hotel
items.description: A practical modern city-room option when you want a short-stay Trat hotel without pretending the accommodation is the attraction.
insider_tips: Good when road access and a simple overnight matter more than old-town atmosphere.
items.current_info: The official Avada Hotel site still presents it as a modern city hotel in Trat.

items.name: Koh Chang Paradise Resort & Spa
items.description: A stronger Koh Chang island option when the extension is an intentional overnight and a beach-resort stay is actually part of the plan.
insider_tips: Only use this if the island stay is central to the trip; it is not the default answer for a Trat-town visit.
items.current_info: The direct Koh Chang Paradise site still positions the resort on Klong Prao Beach.

items.name: AWA Koh Chang
items.description: A more polished Kai Bae resort stay when you want a deliberate island splurge without losing direct-site clarity.
insider_tips: Best when the Koh Chang leg is planned for beach time, not when the mainland town is still the main story.
items.current_info: AWA Koh Chang's official site still positions it on Kai Bae Beach with direct booking and resort facilities.
